description: Sample test queries for Ask My PDF Bot
instructions: Upload the sample PDFs in the data/ folder, then try these questions

questions: What is the main topic of this document?
Can you summarize what this document is about?
What are the key points covered in this document?
What date is mentioned in the document?
What are the terms and conditions mentioned?
What is the population of Mars?
What is the recipe for chocolate cake?

conversation.question: Are there any exceptions to this?
